title: The Smart City Trap: Why We're Measuring the Wrong Things (And How to Fix It)
description: Global smart city indices reward tech infrastructure and expat comfort over resident affordability and community viability — and miss what actually makes a city livable.

title: What My Nephew and I Discovered About AI in Game Audio and Sound Engineering
description: A practical look at how AI language models and generative audio tools are reshaping game and film sound design — enhancing craft rather than replacing it.

title: Why Some Perfectionists Struggle to Become Entrepreneurs
description: Perfectionism can hold back early-stage founders — it stops them testing imperfect products with real customers, missing the market feedback needed to refine an offering.
